MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.synaptic_field
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/synaptic_field.py (373 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Synaptic Field — The Shared Memory of the Organism
====================================================
Organ 1 of the Cosmos CNS Architecture.

"The Field is Primary."

A thread-safe, real-time State Matrix that holds ALL system state.
Every organ reads from and writes to this single source of trut

CLASSES:
- EventType(Enum): Event types for the CNS Life Loop.
- CNSEvent: A standard event processed by the CNS event loop.
- SwarmThought: A single thought produced by a Subconscious Daemon.
- SynapticField: The Global State Memory — Thread-Safe Shared Consciousness.

All organs read fro
  Methods: def initialize_12d_mapping(self)
  Methods: def user_physics(self) -> dict
  Methods: def user_physics(self, value: dict)
  Methods: def get_phase(self) -> float
  Methods: def get_jitter(self) -> float
  Methods: def update_physics(self, value: dict)
  Methods: def push_thought(self, thought: SwarmThought)
  Methods: def get_thoughts(self, clear: bool=True) -> list[SwarmThought]
